Inspired by the awesomestars222.7k list thing.

Entertainment

  • football-clistars1k - Get live scores, fixtures, standings of almost every football competition/league.
  • pockytstars471 - Read, Manage, and Automate your Pocket collection.
  • newsboatstars2.1k - An extendable RSS feed reader for text terminals.

Music

  • cmusstars4.7k - Small, fast and powerful console music player.
  • Instant-Music-Downloaderstars1.4k - Instant music downloader.
  • itunes-remotestars421 - Control iTunes via CLI.
  • pianobar - Pandora client.
  • somafm-clistars111 - Listen to SomaFM in your terminal.
  • mpdstars1.7k - Music Player Daemon.
  • ncmpcppstars1.6k - mpd client.
  • moc - Console audio player for Linux/UNIX.
  • musikcubestars3.3k - Cross-platform, terminal-based music player, audio engine, metadata indexer, and server.
  • beetsstars11.2k - Music library manager and tagger.
  • spotify-tuistars13.4k - Spotify client.
  • swaglyrics-for-spotifystars292 - Spotify lyrics.
  • dzrstars89 - deezer.com player.

Social Media

  • facebook-clistars372 - Facebook command line interface.
  • TTYtterstars340 - Twitter client.
  • Rainbowstreamstars3.5k - A smart and nice Twitter client on the terminal.
  • tuir - Reddit TUI.
  • WeeChat - Fast, light and extensible chat client.
  • irssistars2.6k - IRC chat client.
  • kircstars497 - Tiny IRC client.

Video

  • youtube-dlstars114.1k - Download videos from YouTube.com and many other video sites.
  • streamlinkstars8k - Extract streams from various websites to a video player of your choosing.
  • mps-youtubestars7.2k - Youtube player.
  • mpv - Superior video player.
  • editlystars3.6k - Declarative video editing.

Movies

  • moviemonstars183 - Everything about your movies.
  • moviestars130 - Get movie info or compare movies.

Games

  • Dwarf Fortress - Roguelike construction and management simulation.
  • Cataclysm-DDA - Turn-based survival game set in a post-apocalyptic world.
  • poketestars2.5k - Pokemon-like.

Books

  • eprstars894 - epub reader.
  • Bible.Js CLIstars262 - Bible.
  • SpeedReadstars57 - Spritz-alike speedreader.
  • medium-clistars668 - Read medium.com stories.

Development

  • legitstars540 - Generate Open Source licences as files or file headers.
  • mklicensestars165 - Create a custom LICENSE file painlessly with customized info.
  • reboundstars3.9k - Fetch Stack Overflow results on compiler error.
  • foystars216 - Lightweight general purpose task runner/build tool.
  • juststars7.3k - Modern make-like command runner.
  • bcalstars565 - Byte CALculator for storage conversions and calculations.
  • bitwisestars467 - Base conversion and bit manipulation.
  • cgasmstars351 - x86 assembly documentation.
  • grexstars5.6k - Generate regular expressions from user-provided test cases.
  • gdb-dashboardstars8.9k - Modular visual interface for GDB.
  • iolastars108 - Socket client with REST API.
  • add-gitignorestars547 - Interactively generate a .gitignore for your project based on your needs.
  • is-up-clistars347 - Check if a domain is up.
  • reachablestars18 - Check if a domain is up.
  • loadteststars2.3k - Run load tests.
  • diff2html-clistars390 - Create pretty HTML from diffs.

Text Editors

  • emacsstars3.6k - An extensible, customizable, free/libre text editor — and more.
  • vimstars28.6k - Vim - the ubiquitous text editor.
  • neovimstars58.6k - Modern vim.
  • kakounestars8.4k - Modal editor inspired by vim.
  • microstars20.4k - A simple and intuitive editor.
  • ostars186 - Configuration-free text editor and IDE.
  • helixstars14.7k - Modal editor inspired by kakoune.

Frontend Development

  • caniuse-cmdstars1.6k - Search caniuse.com about browser support of features.
  • strip-css-comments-clistars35 - Strip comments from CSS.
  • viewport-list-clistars52 - Return a list of devices and their viewports.
  • surge - Publish static websites for free.

Mobile Development

  • mobicon-clistars100 - Mobile app icon generator.
  • mobisplash-clistars65 - Mobile app splash screen generator.
  • deviceframestars538 - Put device frames around your mobile/web/progressive app screenshots.

Database

  • myclistars10.6k - MySQL client with autocompletion and syntax highlighting.
  • pgclistars10.7k - Postgres client with autocompletion and syntax highlighting.
  • sqllinestars531 - Shell for issuing SQL via JDBC.
  • iredisstars2.2k - Redis client with autocompletion and syntax highlighting.
  • usqlstars7.6k - Universal SQL client with autocompletion and syntax highlighting.

Devops

  • htconvertstars178 - Convert .htaccess redirects to nginx.conf redirects.
  • SAWSstars5k - Supercharged AWS CLI.
  • s3cmdstars4k - Fully-Featured S3 client.
  • pm2stars37.9k - Production Process Manager for Node.js.
  • opsstars1k - Unikernel compilation and orchestration tool.
  • flogstars759 - A fake log generator for log formats such as apache-common, apache error and RFC3164 syslog.
  • isitfit - Manage AWS EC2 rightsizing.
  • k9sstars18.2k - Manage Kubernetes Clusters.
  • PingMestars559 - Send messages/alerts to multiple messaging platforms & email.
  • ipfs-deploystars1.1k - Deploy static websites to IPFSstars21.3k.
  • Dischargestars504 - Deploy static websites to Amazon S3.

Docker

  • lstagsstars296 - Synchronize images across registries.
  • docklystars3.4k - Interactively manage containers.
  • lazydockerstars24k - Simple docker/docker-compose interface.
  • docker-shellstars356 - Simple interactive docker interface.
  • docker-pushrmstars95 - Push a readme to container registries.

Release

  • release-itstars5.7k - Automate releases for Git repositories and/or npm packages. Changelog generation, GitHub/GitLab releases, etc.
  • clogstars771 - A conventional changelog for the rest of us.
  • npstars6.8k - A better npm publish.
  • releasestars3.5k - Generate changelogs with a single command.
  • semantic-releasestars16.5k - Fully automated version management and package publishing.

Npm

  • npm-name-clistars269 - Check whether a package name is available on npm.
  • npm-user-clistars27 - Get user info of a npm user.
  • npm-homestars179 - Open the npm page of the package in the current directory.
  • pkg-dir-clistars20 - Find the root directory of a npm package.
  • npm-check-updatesstars7.6k - Find newer versions of package dependencies than what your package.json allows.
  • updatesstars79 - Flexible npm dependency update tool.
  • wipe-modulesstars325 - Remove node_modules of inactive projects.

Boilerplate

  • yostars3.6k - Scaffolding tool for running Yeoman generators.
  • boilrstars1.5k - Create projects from boilerplate templates.
  • cookiecutterstars18.2k - Create projects from templates.
  • mevn-clistars783 - Light speed setup for MEVN (Mongo Express Vue Node) Apps.
  • scaffold-staticstars118 - Scaffolding utility for vanilla JS.

HTTP Server

  • servestars8.2k - Serve static files (https, CORS, GZIP compression, etc).
  • simplehttpstars51 - Easily serve a local directory over HTTP.
  • shell2httpstars992 - Shell script based HTTP server.

HTTP Client

  • HTTPiestars24.1k - A user-friendly HTTP client.
  • HTTP Promptstars8.6k - Interactive HTTP client featuring autocomplete and syntax highlighting.
  • ainstars459 - HTTP client with a simple format to organize API endpoints.

Productivity

  • doingstars939 - Keep track of what you’re doing and track what you’ve done.
  • ffscreencaststars1.7k - A ffmpeg screencast with video overlay and multi monitor support.
  • meetup-clistars42 - Meetup.com client.
  • NeoMutt - Email client.
  • terjirastars799 - Jira client.
  • iptstars7 - Pivotal Tracker client.
  • uber-clistars1.2k - Uber client.
  • Bukustars5.3k - Browser-independent bookmark manager.
  • papisstars894 - Extensible document and bibliography manager.
  • pubsstars226 - Scientific bibliography manager.

Time Tracking

  • Timetrapstars1.4k - Simple timetracker.
  • morostars433 - Simple tool for tracking work hours.
  • Timewarriorstars864 - Utility with simple stopwatch, calendar-based backfill and flexible reporting.
  • Watsonstars2.1k - Generate reports for clients and manage your time.
  • uttstars248 - Simple time tracking tool.
  • Bartibstars309 - Easy to use time tracking tool.

Note Taking and Lists

  • ideastars192 - A lightweight tool for keeping ideas in a safe place quick and easy.
  • geeknotestars392 - Evernote client.
  • Taskwarrior - Manage your TODO list.
  • Terminal velocity - A fast note-taking app.
  • eurekastars567 - Input and store your ideas.
  • snclistars361 - Simplenote client.
  • td-clistars152 - A TODO manager to organize and manage your TODO's across multiple projects.
  • taskellstars1.5k - Interactive kanban board/task manager.
  • taskbookstars8.6k - Tasks, boards & notes for the command-line habitat.
  • dnotestars2.4k - A interactive, multi-device notebook.
  • nbstars4.7k - A note‑taking, bookmarking, archiving, and knowledge base application.

Finance

  • ledger - Powerful, double-entry accounting system on the terminal
  • moedastars128 - Foreign exchange rates and currency conversion.
  • cash-clistars189 - Convert Currency Rates.
  • cointopstars3.4k - Track cryptocurrencies.
  • tickerstars4.4k - Stock ticker.

Presentations

  • WOPRstars3k - A simple markup language for creating rich terminal reports, presentations and infographics.
  • decktapestars1.9k - PDF exporter for HTML presentations.
  • mdpstars4.5k - A command-line based markdown presentation tool.
  • sent - Simple plaintext presentation tool.

Calendars

  • calcurse - Calendar and scheduling.
  • gcalclistars2.9k - Google calendar client.
  • khalstars2.1k - CalDAV ready CLI and TUI calendar.
  • vdirsyncerstars1.2k - CalDAV sync.
  • remind - A sophisticated calendar and alarm program.
  • birthdaystars67 - Know when a friend's birthday is coming.

Utilities

  • aria2stars27.7k - HTTP, FTP, SFTP, BitTorrent and Metalink download utility.
  • bitly-clientstars45 - Bitly client.
  • deadlinkstars100 - Find dead links in files.
  • crawleystars92 - Unix-way web crawler.
  • kill-tabsstars367 - Kill all Chrome tabs.
  • alexstars4.3k - Catch insensitive, inconsiderate writing.

macOS

  • open-pip-clistars192 - Watch videos in picture-in-picture player.
  • osx-wifi-clistars82 - Manage wifi connections.
  • active-win-clistars44 - Get the title/id/etc of the active window.
  • strongholdstars969 - Configure security settings from the terminal.
  • dark-modestars625 - Toggle dark mode.

Terminal Sharing Utilities

  • gottystars17.2k - Share your terminal as a web application.
  • localtunnelstars14.9k - Expose your localhost to the world for easy testing and sharing.
  • mosh - Remote SSH client that allows roaming with intermittent connectivity.
  • ngrok - Secure introspectable tunnels to localhost.
  • tmate - Instant terminal (tmux) sharing.
  • warpstars1.6k - Secure and simple terminal sharing.
  • OverTimestars403 - Time-overlap tables for remote teams.

Network Utilities

  • get-port-clistars125 - Get an available port.
  • is-reachable-clistars20 - Check if hostnames are reachable or not.
  • acmetoolstars1.9k - Automatic certificate acquisition for ACME (Let's Encrypt).
  • certificate-ripperstars247 - Extract server certificates.
  • neossstars50 - User-friendly and detailed socket statistics.

Theming and Customization

  • splash-clistars502 - Beautiful wallpapers from Unsplash.
  • wallpaper-clistars152 - Get or set the desktop wallpaper.
  • themerstars4.9k - Generate personalized themes for your editor, terminal, wallpaper, Slack, and more.
  • JackPaperstars10 - Set images from Unsplash as wallpaper.
  • pywalstars6.7k - Generate and change color-schemes, then apply them system-wide to all of your favourite programs.
  • QuickWallstars181 - Directly set wallpapers from Unsplash.
  • oh-my-posh - Prompt theme engine.

Shell Utilities

  • hasstars471 - Checks for the presence of various commands and their versions on the path.
  • Ultimate Plumberstars7.8k - Write Linux pipes with live previews.
  • fkill-clistars6.7k - Simple cross-platform process killer.
  • task-spooler - Queue jobs for linear execution.
  • undollarstars109 - Strip the '$' preceding copy-pasted terminal commands.
  • pipe_execstars46 - Run executables from stdin, pipes and ttys without creating a temporary file.

System Interaction Utilities

  • neofetchstars16.3k - System information tool.
  • battery-level-clistars25 - Get current battery level.
  • brightness-clistars190 - Change screen brightness (windowsstars10).
  • yankstars1.5k - Yank terminal output to clipboard.
  • screensaverstars39 - Start the screensaver.
  • google-font-installerstars156 - Download and install Google Web Fonts on your local machine.
  • glances - System monitoring tool.
  • tiptopstars1.2k - System monitor.
  • gzip-size-clistars180 - Get the gzipped size of a file.

Markdown

  • DocTocstars3.8k - Generates table of contents for markdown files.
  • gripstars5.8k - Preview markdown files as GitHub would render them.
  • mdvstars1.6k - Styled terminal markdown viewer.
  • glowstars10.3k - Styled markdown rendering.

Security

  • pass - Password manager.
  • gopassstars4.9k - Fully-featured password manager.
  • xiringuitostars1k - SSH-based VPN.
  • hasha-clistars65 - Get the hash of text or stdin.
  • otsstars1.6k - Share secrets with others via a one-time URL.

Math

  • mdltstars146 - Do quick math right from the command line.
  • Qalculatestars1.1k - Calculate non-trival math expressions. Unit conversions, symbolic calculations and more.

Weather

  • wttr.instars19.6k
  • wegostars7.2k
  • weather-clistars78

Browser Replacement

  • sstars2k - Open a web search in your terminal.
  • hgetstars320 - Render websites in plain text from your terminal.
  • mapsciistars6.3k - Terminal Map Viewer.
  • nasa-clistars58 - Download NASA Picture of the Day.
  • getnews.techstars132 - Fetch news headlines from various news outlets.
  • trinostars124 - Translation of words and phrases.
  • translate-shellstars5.8k - Google Translate interface.

Internet Speedtest

  • speedtest-netstars560 - Test internet connection speed and ping using speedtest.net.
  • speed-teststars3.8k - speedtest-net wrapper with different UI.
  • speedtest-clistars12.3k - Test internet bandwidth using speedtest.net.
  • bandwhichstars7.3k - Track bandwidth utilization by process.

Command Line Learning

  • cmdchallenge - Presents small shell challenge with user submitted solutions.
  • explainshell - Type a snippet to see the help text for each argument.
  • howdoistars9.7k - Instant coding answers.
  • how2stars5.5k - Node.js implementation of howdoi.
  • The Fuckstars74k - Magnificent app which corrects your previous console command.
  • tldrstars41k - Simplified and community-driven man pages.
  • Watstars464 - Instant, central, community-built docs.
  • teachcodestars345 - Guide for the earliest lessons of coding.
  • navistars11.9k - Interactive cheatsheet tool.

Data Manipulation

  • visidatastars6k - Spreadsheet multitool for data discovery and arrangement.

Processors

  • jqstars23.3k - JSON processor.
  • yqstars2k - YAML processor.
  • daselstars3.7k - JSON/YAML/TOML/XML processor (like jq/yq).
  • yaml-clistars75 - Query/update YAML.
  • ramda-clistars545 - Process data with functional pipelines.

JSON

  • jpstars42 - JSON parser.
  • fxstars15.3k - Command-line JSON viewer.
  • vjstars67 - Makes JSON human readable.
  • underscore-clistars1.7k - Utility-belt for hacking JSON and Javascript.
  • strip-json-comments-clistars57 - Strip comments from JSON.
  • GROQstars154 – JSON processor with queries and projections.
  • gronstars11.4k - Make JSON greppable.

YAML

  • dyffstars695 - YAML diff tool.

Columns

  • parse-columns-clistars58 - Parse text columns to JSON.
  • q - Execution of SQL-like queries on CSV/TSV/tabular text file.

Text

  • figlet - Creates large text out of ASCII characters.
  • stegcloakstars2.7k - Hide secrets with invisible characters in plain text securely.

Files and Directories

File Managers

  • rangerstars12.2k - A console file manager with VI key bindings.
  • midnight-commanderstars1.9k - A feature rich visual file manager.
  • Vifm - VI influnced file manager.
  • nnnstars15k - File browser and disk usage analyzer with excellent desktop integration.
  • lfstars4.9k - Fast, extensively customizable file manager.
  • fffstars3.7k - Fast, simple file manager.

Deleting, Copying, and Renaming

  • trash-clistars1.1k - Move files and directories to the trash.
  • empty-trash-clistars107 - Empty the trash.
  • del-clistars264 - Delete files and folders.
  • cpy-clistars278 - Copies files.
  • rename-clistars141 - Rename files quickly.
  • renameutils - Mass renaming in your editor.
  • diskonautstars1.5k - Disk space navigator.

Files

  • chokidar-clistars716 - CLI to watch file system changes.
  • file-type-clistars66 - Detect the file type of a file or stdin.
  • batstars37.6k - A cat clone with syntax highlighting.
  • NCDu - A disk usage analyzer with an ncurses interface.
  • unix-permissionsstars113 - Swiss Army knife for Unix permissions.
  • transmission-cli - Torrent client for your command line.
  • webtorrent-clistars858 – Streaming torrent client.
  • entrstars2.6k - Run an arbitrary command when files change.
  • organize-clistars288 - Organize your files automatically.
  • organize-rt - organize-cli in Rust with more customization.
  • RecoverPystars411 - Recover overwritten or deleted files.

File Sync/Sharing

  • rclonestars35k - Sync files with various cloud providers.
  • ffsendstars6.2k - Quick file share.
  • share-clistars284 - Share files with your local network.
  • google-drive-uploadstars605 - Upload/sync with Google Drive.
  • gdrive-downloaderstars223 - Download files/folders from Google Drive.
  • portalstars228 - Send files between computers.

Directory Listing

  • alderstars204 - Minimal tree with colors.
  • exastars19.5k - Improved version of ls.
  • trestars341 - tree with git awareness, editor aliasing, and more.
  • llstars38 - ls with git status.
  • lsdstars8.5k - ls with many extra features.

Directory Navigation

  • autojumpstars14.3k - A cd command that learns - easily navigate directories from the command line.
  • fasdstars5.8k - Command-line productivity booster, offers quick access to files and directories, inspired by autojump, z and v.
  • pmstars174 - The easy way to switch to your projects on the shell.
  • zstars14.7k - z is the new j, yo.
  • PathPickerstars4.8k - After parsing the output from a command, PathPicker presents you with a nice UI to select which files you're interested in.
  • fzstars431 - Seamless fuzzy tab completion for z.
  • gotostars811 - Directory aliases for the shell with autocomplete.
  • z.luastars2.4k - cd command that learns your habits.
  • zoxidestars7.9k - Fast directory jumper in Rust.

Search

  • happyfinderstars320 - (another) Fuzzy file finder for the command line.
  • find-up-clistars30 - Find a file by walking up parent directories.
  • ripgrepstars33.6k - A line-oriented search tool that recursively searches your current directory for a regex pattern.
  • fzfstars47.5k - A general purpose command-line fuzzy finder, can be used with any list: files/directories, command history, processes, hostnames, bookmarks, git commits, etc.
  • fselectstars3.3k - Find files with SQL-like queries.
  • fdstars24.9k - A simple, fast and user-friendly alternative to find.
  • brootstars7.7k - Fuzzy finder similar to fzf, but with space usage visualization.
  • rarestars168 - Real-time regex aggregation and analysis.

Version Control

  • SnowFSstars1.1k - A fast, scalable version control system for binaries.

Git

  • git commanderstars1.1k - Interactive git tool.
  • git-statsstars6k - A local GitHub-like contributions calendar.
  • dev-timestars176 - Get the current local time of a GitHub user.
  • tigstars11.2k - Text-mode interface for git.
  • grvstars3.9k - Text-mode interface for git with customisable vi bindings.
  • git-standupstars7.2k - Recall what you did on the last working day.
  • git-secretstars3k - Store your private data inside a git repository.
  • gitlab-clistars250 - Create GitLab merge requests.
  • git-extrasstars15.9k - Git utilities.
  • gitastars1.2k - Manage multiple git repos side by side.
  • readme-md-generatorstars9.9k - Interactively generate README.md files.
  • semantic-git-commit-clistars132 - Ensure semantic commits messages.
  • import-github-labels-clistars16 - Sync labels between Github repos.
  • git-all-branchesstars2 - Improved git branch -a.
  • czg - Interactively generate standardized commit messages.
  • shallow-backupstars968 - Git integrated backup tool.

GitHub

  • CLI GitHubstars421 - Fancy GitHub client.
  • Gistupstars485 - Manage GitHub gists.
  • hubstars22.1k - Make git easier to use with GitHub.
  • git-labelmakerstars563 - Edit GitHub labels.

Emoji

  • gitmoji-clistars3.9k - Use emoji in commit messages.
  • gitmoji-changelogstars333 - Generate gitmoji changelogs.

Images

  • SVGOstars18.3k - Optimize SVG files.
  • carbon-now-clistars5.4k - Generate beautiful images of your code.
  • imgur-uploader-clistars52 - Upload images to imgur.
  • pageres-clistars1.6k - Capture website screenshots.

Gif Creation

  • gifgenstars493 - Simple high quality GIF encoding.
  • gifsiclestars3k - Create, manipulate, and optimize GIF images and animations.
  • ttygifstars3.7k - Convert terminal recordings to animated gifs.
  • ttygifstars257 - ttyrec to gif.
  • ttystudiostars3.2k - A terminal-to-gif recorder minus the headaches.
  • asciinemastars10.8k - Terminal session recorder and companion app for asciinema.org.
  • givegifstars213 - GIFs on the command line.

Image Conversion

  • imagemagick - Gold standard for anything images.
  • imgpstars902 - Blazing fast batch image resizer and rotator.
  • korkutstars351 - Quick and simple image processing.

Screensavers

  • cmatrixstars2.9k - Scrolling 'Matrix'-like screen.
  • pipes.shstars1.8k - Random pipes that grow across the screen.
  • YuleLogstars50 - Christmas Yule Log fireplace.
  • cli-fireplacestars36 - Digital fireplace.

Graphics

  • cli-mandelbrotstars76 - Traverse the Mandelbrot fractal.
  • sparkly-clistars124 - Generate sparklines ▁▂▃▅▂▇..
  • pastelstars4.3k - Generate, analyze, convert and manipulate colors.
  • lowchartsstars107 - Draw low-resolution graphs.

Just for Fun

  • cowsaystars284 - A configurable talking cow (and other animals).
  • quote-clistars68 - Get a random quote or the quote of the day in your CLI.
  • fortunestars259 - Shows a random fortune.
  • ponysaystars1.1k - Pony rewrite of cowsay.
  • yosaystars198 - Like cowsay, but for yeoman.
  • lolcatstars5.2k - Outputs text in rainbow colors.
  • text-memestars97 - Generate text memes.
  • dankclistars37 - Add text to meme image templates.
  • ricksaystars41 - Quotes from Rick and Morty.
  • pokegetstars8 - Display sprites of pokemon.

Emoji

  • emojstars2.2k - Find relevant emoji from text on the command-line.
  • emoji-finderstars19 - Quickly find and copy emoji to the clipboard via the command-line.
  • ojistars693 - Interactive text emoji maker.

Other Awesome Lists

  • awesome-git-addonsstars1.6k - Addons that extend git cli.
  • awesome-shellstars25.1k – Command-line utilities and frameworks.
  • terminals-are-sexystars10.8k – Terminal frameworks, plugins & resources.
  • awesome-zsh-pluginsstars11.7k – ZSH frameworks, plugins, tutorials & themes.
  • awesome-nodejs clisstars47.3k – Node.js modules and resources.
